product_overview: A serverless backend proxy that connects the LoamLab SketchUp plugin to the Coze AI rendering workflow, while managing user monetization (points), referrals, and payment webhooks. It provides temporary storage for uploads, enforces security (X-User-Email header and webhook HMAC verification), and reports versioning for the plugin.
core_goals: Proxy rendering requests from the SketchUp plugin to Coze Workflows while minimizing cost by validating and deducting user points before expensive API calls.
Manage user accounts, track energy/credits and lifetime points, support auto-registration and referral rewards.
Securely process LemonSqueezy payment webhooks with HMAC verification and idempotent transaction handling to credit points.
Provide temporary signed storage URLs for uploads and ensure cleanup of temporary files after processing.
Expose a simple versioning endpoint so the SketchUp plugin can detect new releases and download locations.

features.name: Rendering Engine Proxy
features.description: Accept render requests from the SketchUp client, validate and deduct user points by resolution, provide temporary signed upload URLs, submit or proxy the job to the Coze workflow, and return or stream the resulting image URL.
user_flows: POST /api/render with X-User-Email and body {user_prompt, resolution} -> Receive 200 with {job_id, upload_url, points_deducted} -> PUT upload_url with image bytes -> Receive 200 (uploaded) -> POST /api/render/submit with {job_id} -> Receive 202 with coze_workflow_id -> GET /api/render/status?job_id={job_id} -> Receive 200 with {status: "completed", image_url} -> GET {image_url} -> Receive 200 with image binary
POST /api/render with X-User-Email and body {user_prompt, resolution} when user has insufficient points -> Receive 402 with {error: "Insufficient points"} (no upload_url, no Coze call)
POST /api/render without X-User-Email header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

POST /api/render with X-User-Email and body {user_prompt, resolution} -> Receive 200 with {job_id, upload_url} -> PUT upload_url fails (network/403) -> Receive 403 or network error -> POST /api/render/cancel with {job_id} -> Receive 200 and server refunds/drops reservation (temporary cleanup)

features.name: User Account Management
features.description: Expose account endpoints to read point balances and account stats, automatically register new users when needed, and apply referral rewards to inviter/invitee accounts.
user_flows: GET /api/user?email={email} with X-User-Email header -> Receive 200 with {email, points, lifetime_points, referral_code}

GET /api/user?email={unknown_email} with X-User-Email header -> Receive 404 user not found -> POST /api/user with body {email, referral_code?} -> Receive 201 with {email, points: initial_points, lifetime_points: 0, referral_code}
POST /api/user/referral with X-User-Email and body {invited_email, inviter_code} -> Receive 200 with {awarded_to_inviter, awarded_to_invited, new_balances}
POST /api/user/referral with X-User-Email and body {invited_email, inviter_code} if referral already used or invalid -> Receive 409 or 400 with {error: "Invalid or already used referral"}

features.name: LemonSqueezy Webhook
features.description: Receive payment notifications from LemonSqueezy, verify HMAC signature using LEMON_WEBHOOK_SECRET, credit points according to variant_id (Starter/Pro/Studio/Topup), and record transactions idempotently to avoid double-crediting.
user_flows: POST /api/webhook with X-Signature header and payload {event: "subscription_payment_success", variant_id, transaction_id, customer_email} -> Server verifies HMAC signature with LEMON_WEBHOOK_SECRET -> Receive 200 OK and server credits points based on variant_id and inserts transaction record

POST /api/webhook with X-Signature and payload having a transaction_id already present in transactions table -> Server verifies HMAC -> Receive 200 OK with body {status: "already_processed"} and no additional credits (idempotent handling)
POST /api/webhook with invalid X-Signature -> Server rejects verification -> Receive 401 Unauthorized and no processing
POST /api/webhook with missing transaction_id or malformed payload -> Receive 400 Bad Request

features.name: Frontend UI Dashboard
features.description: Provide the plugin/web UI with localized dashboard controls: show credits balance, language switcher, rendering controls (resolution), render history modal, login via Google, and referral management modal. The UI interacts with backend endpoints to display balances, submit renders, and manage referrals.
user_flows: GET /api/user?email={email} with X-User-Email header from UI -> Receive 200 with {points, lifetime_points, referral_code} -> UI displays credits in header

User clicks Login: POST /api/auth/google (or GET redirect) -> Receive 302 redirect to Google OAuth -> After OAuth, GET /api/auth/callback?code={code} -> Receive 200 with {jwt_token, email} -> UI stores token and uses X-User-Email in subsequent calls

From UI: POST /api/render with X-User-Email and body {user_prompt, resolution} -> Receive 200 with {job_id, upload_url} -> PUT upload_url with image -> Receive 200 -> GET /api/render/status?job_id={job_id} -> Receive 200 with {status, image_url} -> UI opens modal showing progress and final image
From UI: POST /api/user/referral with X-User-Email and body {invited_email, inviter_code} -> Receive 200 with updated balances -> UI updates referral modal
From UI: GET /api/user without X-User-Email or with expired token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> UI shows login prompt

features.name: Versioning / Release Info
features.description: Expose plugin version info and download locations so the SketchUp plugin can check for updates and prompt users to download new releases.
user_flows: GET /api/version -> Receive 200 with {latest_version, download_url, release_notes, min_supported_version}
GET /api/version with malformed query or restricted admin-only query -> Receive 403 Forbidden or 400 Bad Request

features.name: Rendering Engine Proxy
features.description: Handles image rendering requests, point deduction, and temporary image storage.

endpoints.description: Submit a render task to Coze workflow.

features.name: User Account Management
features.description: Manages user points, registration, and referrals.

endpoints.description: Get user points and account statistics.

features.description: Multi-language SketchUp UI for rendering controls and user accounts.

known_limitations.issue: Minimal input validation on prompt length
known_limitations.impact: Possible long strings might affect Coze API behavior.
